frame_eqs_str: a['dx']=(a['dx']-0.001); a['dy']=(a['dy']-0.001); a['ib_size']=((Math.abs(below(a['progress'], 0.5))>0.00001)?((a['ib_size']-a['progress'])):(0)); a['ob_size']=((Math.abs(above(a['progress'], 0.5))>0.00001)?((a['ob_size']-(a['progress']-0.5))):(0.5)); a['ib_r']=(a['ib_r']+(a['progress']*2)); a['ib_g']=(a['ib_g']-(a['progress']*2)); a['ob_r']=(a['ob_size']*2); a['ob_g']=(a['ob_g']-(a['ob_size']*2));
